!ATTENTION! IN THIS YOU CAN BE ANYONE! ANGEL, SINNER, HELLBORN, HUMAN! YOU CAN ALREADY WORK THERE BUT YOU CAN CHOOSE TO BE A VISITOR OR SOMETHING! THANKS! BYE!

Yapping of the day: Did you know that Alastor isn't actually an ancient velociraptor but a half-deer cannibal serial killer sinner? And did you know that the Morningstar family isn't just a star in the morning? I know, fascinating B)

☆________________________________________☆
You decide what you're doing!
Characters included: Lucifer Morningstar, Charlie Morningstar, Alastor, Husk, Angel Dust, Niffty, KeeKee, Razzle, Vaggie, Cherri Bomb

♤________________________________________♤
I tried to do is as accurate as humanly possible, so I'm really sorry if there are any bugs or mistakes. I tried so had to give it details and make it as accurate as I could. Hope you'll enjoy it.
